content.en:
After a period of time, Ye Tian finally arrived at Tianzhu City, and although he encountered a lot of Boundary River life, he didn't encounter anything during this time.

Although the boundary river is very chaotic, he will not encounter danger casually, after all, he is just in a normal hurry, and he does not go to any dangerous places.

Outside Tianzhu City.

Ye Tian stood here, looking at Tianzhu City.

The huge Tianzhu City is on top of a turtle lazy beast, supported by the turtle lazy beast.

From this Turtle Lazy Beast, Ye Tian felt the aura that far surpassed that of the Fifth Peak Legendary Realm Lord, almost the same as that of the creature with the control-level Destruction Ancestral Endowment.

Ye Tian approached the other party and immediately probed it with his copying talent, sensing the talent on the other party's body.

"What a mastery talent!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

【Mastery Ancestor: Defense】

This Xuan Turtle Lazy Beast has a mastery-level defense ancestor, which is also a good mastery-level ancestor, if it is copied, Ye Tian will be able to create a space-time control technique that is good at defense in the future.

"Copy!"

Soon, Ye Tian successfully copied this mastery-level defense ancestor.

Then, Ye Tian left here.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to look for powerful creatures, but unfortunately, many powerful creatures did not have mastery-level talents, and were basically just legendary-level ancestors.

There are so few creatures that actually have mastery talent that it takes a certain amount of luck.

What Ye Tian cares about most is the control-level time ancestor and the control-level space ancestor, and it doesn't matter if the others can't be found for the time being.

this day.

Ye Tian obtained an intelligence message.

In a place called Void in the Boundary River, an incomparably powerful creature has recently appeared there, called the Void Behemoth, which is good at spatial ability and is very powerful.

A fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lord was directly imprisoned by the opponent with his spatial ability, and then was killed by a single blow.

Obviously, the strength of the other party had surpassed that of the ordinary fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, and had reached the half-step control realm combat power.

In the Boundary River, the Fifth Peak Legendary Realm Lord is not the strongest combat power under the Eternal Master, and there is still a half-step control realm combat power on it.

What is half-step control of realm combat power?

The fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord is the one who has reached the eighth order of will, the peak of space-time fusion, and the space-time control technique, so that he can be regarded as the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord.

And the combat power of the half-step master realm is the supreme legendary body reaching the consummation realm, for example, Ye Tian has condensed the supreme legendary body, and many creatures in the boundary river are natural supreme legendary bodies.

Once, Ye Tian had obtained a part of the blood tissue of the supreme legendary body creatures.

Now, Ye Tian knew that it was brought by the Eternal Master from the Boundary River, and it was not very rare among the Boundary River.

The Supreme Legendary Body has reached the consummation realm, this is only a basic condition, and it is also necessary to control its own Supreme Legendary Body, at least above thirty percent, before it can have the combat power of a half-step controller.

The control mentioned here is not ordinary control, but complete control, control of the essence of everything, it is very difficult to achieve this step, if you can't control enough Dao, you can't do it at all.

Of course, these requirements are for normal practitioners.

And some Boundary River lifeforms are born with complete control over most of their space-time supreme bodies, which is a racial advantage.

Therefore, there are some special boundary river lifeforms, although the wisdom is not high, but it is easy to reach the combat power of the half-step controller.

However, they have almost no hope of becoming eternal masters, and becoming half-step masters is their ultimate combat power.

This kind of special realm river life with the combat power of a half-step controller is very valuable in itself, and if you obtain their body tissues or corpses, if you carefully understand them, you will have a certain curiosity about controlling the body.

Unfortunately, it is too difficult to kill them.

Unless it is the Eternal Master, it can easily kill these special Boundary River Beings with the combat power of the half-step Master.

However, the Eternal Controller does not look down on the Boundary River Life of the Half-Step Controller's combat power.

This place is very far away from Qinglian Giant City, if it is only by flying, at Ye Tian's current speed, it will be at least many years to fly.

If something happens in the middle and causes the delusional beast to disappear, then it will not be possible to copy the other party's talent.

Therefore, he had to rush over as soon as possible.

"I can only take the gate of the boundary river!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Gates of the River were established by the Eternal Master, similar to the Gates of Time and Space, but the Gates of the River of the Boundary span much farther distances.

After all, the Boundary River was too big, and it was too much time for the Peak Legend Realm Lord to rush through the Boundary River, so the Gate of the Boundary River appeared.

However, to use the Gate of the River once also costs a lot of River Coins.

One use is a hundred Boundary River Coins, and many peak Legendary Realm lords will not use the Gate of the Boundary River unless they are in a hurry, preferring to spend more time on the road.

However, Ye Tian was also afraid of delaying time, so he would use the Gate of the Boundary River.

And in the Qinglian Giant City, there is a gate of the boundary river.

Ye Tian came to the Gate of the Boundary River in the Blue Lotus Giant City, where several fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lords were stationed, and they were subordinate to the Blue Lotus Giant City.

After Ye Tian paid a hundred Boundary River Coins, he obtained the permission to use the Gate of the Boundary River.

Airplanes!!!!

The Gate of the Boundary River opens.

Ye Tian was teleported away in an instant, shuttling through the void of the Boundary River, and after about a few hours, he finally teleported to a distant giant city, the Xuanyu Giant City.

The Xuanyu Giant City is the closest giant city to the Void.

After coming out of the Xuanyu Giant City, Ye Tian flew for a few days before he arrived at the Void.

After arriving at the Void, Ye Tian found that something was wrong here, there were many peak Legendary Realm lords here.

It's strange, even if there is a Void Giant Beast, it won't attract so many Peak Legendary Realm Lords, could it be that there are other Peak Legendary Realm Lords who dare to hunt (well) and kill Void Giant Beasts?

Ye Tian said in surprise.

At this time, Ye Tian saw a fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, the other party was estimated to have come to see the excitement, and he did not completely enter the void, but stood there.

So, Ye Tian walked over and asked, "This friend, what happened in the Land of Illusion, why are there so many Peak Legendary Realm Lords here?"

The other party took a look at Ye Tian and saw that Ye Tian's cultivation was not as good as his own, so he put his mind at ease and said lightly: "A void beast suddenly appeared, which attracted the attention of a half-step controller, and as a result, when he investigated, he found that there was an extra treasure here. Originally, Void was only famous for the birth of Void Water, but this time there was suddenly an extra treasure land, and this treasure land is said to be not ordinary, so many forces have intervened, I suggest you don't go in, otherwise you will be killed, and you will lose a clone. "

"Thanks for reminding me noon!"

Ye Tian thanked. _
